posts.author: erusso (Elizabeth R.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We’re pretty new with Monday.com, but something our end users have asked for is the ability to turn off the “seen” and “last seen” features. We have a lot of shareable boards with clients and we don’t want to have the “seen” updates or “last seen” on the board enabled for these boards.

It would be great if there was a board level permission that can either enable or disable “seen.”

Screen Shot 2022-03-14 at 10.12.15 AM829×92 11.1 KB
